description: DISABLED 2026-07-08 (token audit). Headroom's system/user message compression rewrites the prompt prefix on every request, which breaks Anthropic prompt caching — cache reads cost ~0.1x input, so compression was a large NET LOSS on subscription plans. The CCR compress/retrieve tools also duplicate content in Claude Code's append-only context window. Do not re-enable for Claude Code. See wiki/headroom-postmortem.md.

_archived_config.usage: Launch Claude Code with: ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8787 claude
